column3: To exercise patience especially when others do wrong or are difficult to deal with
To be consious of Allah, and act accordingly
To realize that your skills/talents are gifts from Allah, so you tame your ego when successes are achieved
To be pleased with what you already have and the decree of Allah when it occers (whether good or bad)
To persevere in challenging situations and turn them into positive experiences
To trust Allah and rely upon Him in all matters
To commit to doing consistent actions and habits – even if they're small
To always work for the eternal afterlife and consider the Akhirah-outcome of actions
To be mindfully greatful to Allah for the opportunities, and greatful to people around you
To not fear the truth and its outcomes, to stand firm for the values you believe in

column1: Love or the sake of Allah
column3: To see the good in people and love them purely for the sake of Allah
To be driven by higher purpose and impact, not solely for the short-term results
To act recognizing that blessings and bounties are from Allah, and His Kingdom and Blessings are infinite and limitless
To regularly reflect on your words and actions how they could be better
To be present mindfully in order to connect deeply with others
To remember the intentions behind your actions and renew your intentions often
To take initative in what is beneficial for you in this life and the next, and not hesitate or delay good words or actions
